notes: Arma 3 stock glass armor material. Engine coeff ~0.1x vs Default. Used for vehicle windshields and viewports in CfgVehicleHitPoints. Includes armored glass variants. Represents the game's abstract 'glass' armor class.

source.reference: ARMA 3 game engine configuration, BI config reference
source.methodology: RHAe=0.1 is the ARMA 3 game engine value for its 'glass' armor class. Density set to approximate soda-lime glass.
